mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT * FROM notice WHERE company_id = #{company_id} AND date < (SELECT date FROM notice WHERE id = #{nId}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM notice WHERE id = #{nId} AND company_id = #{company_id}) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM notice WHERE company_id = #{company_id} AND date > (SELECT date FROM notice WHERE id = #{nId}) ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1) ) AS combined_results ORDER BY date ASC
